seed_nodes.statement: Landau-Ginzburg symmetry-breaking theory classifies phases via symmetry groups and order parameters.
CGW path-connectivity classifies gapped phases via smooth paths of local gapped Hamiltonians.
Topological insulators show that symmetry breaking alone is insufficient: phases can be distinct without a local order parameter.
The Kitaev honeycomb model exhibits both Abelian and non-Abelian topological phases and highlights hidden gauge / entanglement structure beyond Landau order.
The CGW definition only applies to gapped systems; any complete axiomatization must also cover gapless phases such as quantum critical points and gapless spin liquids.
Frontier framework seed: topological order can be encoded via long-range entanglement, modular data, and topological entanglement entropy; these are allowed as black-box conceptual seeds.
Frontier framework seed: symmetry-protected topological phases admit classification principles using anomalies, boundary obstruction, and in some regimes group cohomology / cobordism style data.

target.statement: Derive a minimal axiomatic framework — a set of axioms A_1, A_2, ..., A_k — for quantum phases of matter that: (1) subsumes the Landau-Ginzburg symmetry-breaking classification as a special case; (2) classifies gapped topological phases (topological insulators, topological order, SPT phases) without reducing to symmetry breaking; (3) applies to gapless systems including quantum critical points and quantum spin liquids; (4) produces computable invariants that distinguish any two inequivalent phases; (5) is falsifiable in the sense that a hypothetical new quantum system could in principle violate one of the axioms, demonstrating that it represents a genuinely new phase not covered by the framework.

planning_constraints: Frontier frameworks such as CGW, topological-order diagnostics, and SPT classification principles may be used as black-box seeds.
You must explicitly identify the unresolved extension from gapped to general gapless phases.
Do not treat a complete gapless-capable axiomatization as an available seed.
